# WebPeel — The Web Data API for AI

> Fetch, search, extract, and understand any webpage with one API call.

## What is WebPeel?

WebPeel turns any webpage into clean, structured data optimized for LLMs. It handles JavaScript rendering, anti-bot bypasses, and 55+ domain-specific extractors automatically.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install
npm install webpeel

# Fetch any URL
npx webpeel "https://example.com"

# Search the web
npx webpeel search "best restaurants in NYC"

# API
curl "https://api.webpeel.dev/v1/fetch?url=https://example.com" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY"
```

## Core Features

### Fetch (`/v1/fetch` or CLI `webpeel fetch`)
- Any URL → clean markdown, HTML, text, or JSON
- 55+ domain extractors (Amazon, Reddit, YouTube, Yelp, GitHub, etc.)
- JavaScript rendering with `--render` or `render=true`
- Anti-bot bypass with `--stealth` or `stealth=true`
- Screenshot capture with `--screenshot`
- Structured data extraction with `--schema product` (9 built-in schemas)
- Custom JSON schema: `--schema '{"price":"number","title":"string"}'`
- Bypass domain extractors: `--skip-domain-api` or `noDomainApi=true`

### Search (`/v1/search` or CLI `webpeel search`)
- Web search with structured results
- Fetch + summarize top results

### Smart Search (`/v1/search/smart`)
- AI-powered intent detection (restaurants, products, flights, hotels, cars, rentals)
- Real-time data: Yelp ratings, Google Places hours, fuel prices, flight costs
- AI synthesis via Qwen on Ollama
- SSE streaming for progressive results

### Feed (`/v1/feed`)
- RSS/Atom feed discovery and parsing
- Auto-discovers feeds from any URL

### Extract (`/v1/extract`)
- Structured data extraction with JSON schema
- No LLM needed for built-in schemas (BM25 extraction)
- Schemas: product, article, listing, contact, event, recipe, job, business, review

### Watch (CLI `webpeel watch`)
- Scheduled page monitoring with change detection
- Cron-style intervals

### MCP Server
- 18 tools for Claude, Cursor, VS Code
- `npx webpeel mcp` to start
- Tools: fetch, search, screenshot, extract, map, crawl, and more

## Common Use Cases

### "I want to scrape a page but it's blocked"
```bash
webpeel fetch "https://example.com" --stealth
```

### "I want the REAL page, not WebPeel's API shortcut"
```bash
webpeel fetch "https://accuweather.com/..." --skip-domain-api
```

### "I want structured JSON, not markdown"
```bash
webpeel fetch "https://amazon.com/dp/..." --schema product --json
```

### "I want to search and get AI-summarized results"
```bash
curl -X POST "https://api.webpeel.dev/v1/search/smart" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer KEY" \
  -d '{"q":"best restaurants in manhattan"}'
```

### "I want to monitor a page for changes"
```bash
webpeel watch "https://example.com/pricing" --interval 3600
```

## Pricing
- Free: 500 requests/week
- Starter: $9/month — 10,000 requests
- Pro: $49/month — 100,000 requests
- Enterprise: Custom
